title: Fix the None Comparison
description: Code uses equality comparison with None instead of identity check, violating E711.
pr_diff:
PR Diff:
  + def validate_user(user):
  +     if user.email == None:
  +         raise ValueError("Email required")
  +     if user.name == None:
  +         raise ValueError("Name required")
  +     return True
